source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Please choose the SMILES expression of the transition-state structure shown in the image, ignoring the arrows. <image_1>
extraction_notes: answer field is option letter only; mapped to option C text
image field contains a PIL.Image object representation, not a path or URL

issues: metadata.extraction_notes indicates the original image field contained a PIL.Image object representation rather than a path or URL

image_dependency: 题干明确要求根据“shown in the image”选择过渡态结构的 SMILES
requires_image=true，且 text_dominant=false，说明关键信息主要在图像中
任务涉及化学结构的视觉识别，单靠题干文本无法恢复目标结构
multi_step: 需要先从图中识别过渡态结构，再与 4 个候选 SMILES 进行匹配
题干还有“ignoring the arrows”的附加条件，要求过滤图中非目标视觉元素
虽然不是复杂计算题，但至少包含图像解析与选项比对两步
verifiability: 存在 4 个明确选项，答案可直接核对是否对应其中一项
answer_type=short_text，且给出的答案字符串完整明确，可做精确匹配
registry_passed=true，图像与文本资产均已登记，后续规则化核验可行

risk_flags: asset registry issues mention original image field was a PIL.Image representation
metadata.image_paths is empty despite image_manifest existing

decision_reasons: Question, answer, and primary image assets are all present, so the core semantics needed for this image-dependent chemistry item are available.
Initial scoring shows very high image dependency and high verifiability, indicating the sample is both relevant and checkable.
The noted registry issues are metadata/path inconsistencies, but they do not remove the registered image asset itself.
Given the collection-stage high-recall policy, these recoverable asset issues are not sufficient to reject or downgrade a semantically intact sample.
